creator: sat@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This port is needed for horde-dimp, but as Beech explained 
dimp also needs trunk versions of other horde components. 
Moreover, the horde infrastructure has changed quite a bit 
since this pr was submitted. 

Close PR until it's more clear if porting dimp is worth the 
pain. 

Thanks!
